title: Workdown Views
description: Validates the structure of a project's views.yaml file. Declares persisted views rendered by `workdown render` (board, tree, graph, table, gantt, charts, etc.).

directory.description: Output directory where `workdown render` writes view files, relative to the project root. Defaults to 'views'.

views.description: Ordered list of view definitions. Each entry has a unique id used as the output filename.

view_id.description: Unique identifier for the view. Becomes the output filename (views/<id>.html). Lowercase, digits, hyphens, and underscores only.

where_clauses.description: AND-combined filter expressions. Each string uses the `workdown query --where` grammar.

field_name.description: Name of a field defined in schema.yaml (or the virtual `id` field).

aggregate.description: Aggregation function for chart and metric views.

bucket.description: Date bucketing for heatmap axes bound to date fields.

view.description: A single view entry. The `type` field discriminates which slots are required.

board.description: Kanban-style board grouped by a choice/multichoice/string field.

tree.description: Hierarchical tree following a single link field (e.g. parent).

graph.description: Directed graph following a links field (e.g. depends_on). Optionally nests nodes inside Mermaid subgraphs by walking a single-target Link field (e.g. parent).

table.description: Tabular view with an ordered list of columns.

columns.description: Ordered field names to render as columns.

gantt.description: Gantt timeline anchored at a start date. Each bar's end is determined by one of three input modes: (1) explicit end-date field (`end`); (2) computed as `start + duration` from a duration field (`duration`); (3) predecessor mode (`after` + `duration`), where each item's start is `max(start_field?, max(predecessor.end))` over a links field naming predecessors. Exactly one of (`end`), (`duration`), or (`after` + `duration`) must be configured. Cross-checked by `workdown validate`. Optionally grouped by a categorical or link field.

after.description: Predecessor-mode link/links field (e.g. depends_on) whose values name items each bar comes after. Requires `duration`, forbids `end`. The link field must have `allow_cycles: false` and not be an inverse name.

gantt_by_initiative.description: Gantt timeline partitioned by initiative — emits one Mermaid `gantt` block per top-level ancestor of `root_link`. Per-bar resolution mirrors `gantt`: exactly one of (`end`), (`duration`), or (`after` + `duration`) configures the input mode. Items are bucketed by walking `root_link` upward against the full store, so chains span filter boundaries.

after.description: Predecessor-mode link/links field. Requires `duration`, forbids `end`. Must have `allow_cycles: false`.

root_link.description: Single-target link field whose chain is walked upward to find each item's initiative root. Must have `allow_cycles: false` and not be an inverse name.

bar_chart.description: Bar chart grouped by a categorical field; aggregates an optional numeric value.

line_chart.description: Line chart with x/y fields (numeric or date).

workload.description: Capacity/workload view summing effort over a start/end window.

metric.description: Single-number metric. `aggregate: count` requires no value field; other aggregates aggregate a numeric `value` field.

treemap.description: Treemap view grouped by a field, sized by a numeric field.

heatmap.description: Heatmap view with x/y axes and an aggregate. `bucket` applies date bucketing when an axis is a date field.
